calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Continued To May-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tokiko Yasuda for petitioner Sumie Hayashi

Responding to the Court's expressed concern that the proposed modification of trust would entirely eliminate Roy's interest in estate property, Ms. Yasuda stated thet Roy wasbeing provided services through the Golden Gate Regional Center and was living with the petitioner, so his needs were being met. The Court again noted that the modification as proposed cuts Roy out, and said he was especially concerned in view of Roy being developmentally disabled and without legal representation or a guardian ad litem. Ms. Yasuda requested a continuance to make a supplemental showing of the circumstances. justifying the modification. The Court said he would grant a continuance if a guardian ad litem is to be appointed Ms. Yasuda agreed to submit a petitin for appointment of a guardian ad litem. The matter was continued to May 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204, for appointment of the Guardian ad litem and for filing of supplemental submissions.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
